calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-21-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Barry Endick, ESQ., Hassard Bonnington 415-288-9800 for, Defendant/Appellant,Yellow Cab Cooperative; Jim Gillespie,authorized agent for Yellow Cab
Sufyan Alsharif, Plaintiff

This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn

Sufyan Alsharif testifies on his own behalf.
Barry Endick questions Sufyan Alsharif, on behalf of the defendant
James Gillespie testifies on behalf of the defendant.
The Court accepts defendants' group exhibits A.

Ziad Sad, testifies on behalf of the plaintiff.

The Court orders counsel for defendant to submit their brief re: the laws and regulations as stated today, the brief is to be filed no later than July 17, 2015.

Upon submission of the briefing, the Court will take the matter under submission.
The Court will return all exhibits upon ruling.

Judge Pro Tem:E. Myles; Clerk:R. Goulding;(525)Reporter: Kyle McLean, CSR 13787 510-451-1580

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-23-2015 Judgment Entered
